response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, and deep-learning workload optimization, which are core requirements for this role. While their software engineering background is strong, their work has focused on web/mobile applications and general software development rather than hardware-software co-design or performance-critical systems.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in system architecture and optimization
Proven ability to work across multiple languages and technologies (TypeScript, D, Java, etc.)
Demonstrated expertise in performance-critical applications (low-latency services, real-time systems)
concerns: No documented experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPUs, or AI accelerator architectures
Background does not align with hardware-software co-design or deep-learning workload analysis
Lacks the required educational path (no advanced degree in relevant engineering/CS fields) and equivalent experience

key_factors.factor: Strong software engineering but non-specialized background
